arts.ttl: Where Jurgen Klopp's Liverpool staff are now - managerial role and job outside football
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp wasn't the only member of Liverpool's coaching staff to leave Anfield at the end of last season, but a number of them have since begun new jobs elsewhere

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury crisis deepens ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: There is no let up on the injury front for Arsenal after they suffered another blow on Tuesday night. The Gunners laboured to a 1-0 victory over Shakhtar Donetsk at the Emirates Stadium thanks to a Gabriel Martinelli shot that bounced in off the goalkeeper for an own goal. Leandro Trossard missed a penalty in […] The post Arsenal injury crisis deepens ahead of Liverpool clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops biggest hint yet that Bukayo Saka will miss Arsenal vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal star Bukayo Saka has missed Arsenal's last two matches in the Premier League and Champions League through injury and faces a race against time to be fit for Sunday

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool eye three transfer targets as Alexander-Arnold to be offered huge Real Madrid deal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are planning to offer Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold a contract in the range of £14-15million per year extending until the 2029-2030 season, CaughtOffside understands. Sources close to the situation have informed CaughtOffside that, the La Liga giants have been in discussions with Alexander-Arnold’s close circle, and the player is pleased with the proposed […] The post Exclusive: Liverpool eye three transfer targets as Alexander-Arnold to be offered huge Real Madrid deal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sign teenage talent to first professional contract ahead of goalkeeping shake-up
arts.sum: Liverpool have signed teenage goalkeeper Kornel Misciur to his first professional contract, handing him the opportunity to prove himself worthy of a future first-team place. It has brought uncertainty to the 32-year-old Brazilian's long-term place at the club, especially with a degree of future-proofing already carried out in the form of a pre-arranged £29m transfer for Valencia and Georgia goalkeeper Giorgi Mamardashvili.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah truth hiding in plain sight all along as Liverpool get contract message
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is only becoming more important to the way Liverpool play as the wait for his new deal goes on
